evals.prompt: I'm about to launch a phase-field simulation. My config is at simulation.json. Required parameters are dt, dx, and kappa. Valid ranges are dt between 1e-6 and 1e-2, and dx between 1e-4 and 1e-1. Make sure I have at least 2GB of free disk space.
evals.expected_output: Agent runs preflight_checker.py to validate the configuration, checking required parameters, ranges, and disk space before the simulation starts.
assertions: Invokes scripts/preflight_checker.py with --config simulation.json --required dt,dx,kappa --ranges 'dt:1e-6:1e-2,dx:1e-4:1e-1' --min-free-gb 2.0 --json
Output includes report.status (PASS, WARN, or BLOCK)
Reports any blockers that would prevent simulation launch
Reports any warnings about non-critical issues

script_checks.description: preflight on a valid phase-field config (all required params present and in range) reports no blockers

evals.prompt: My simulation has been running for a while. Can you check simulation.log for any signs of trouble? Watch for residual growth above 10x and time step drops of more than 100x.
evals.expected_output: Agent runs runtime_monitor.py on the log file with the specified alert thresholds, reporting any concerning patterns.
assertions: Invokes scripts/runtime_monitor.py with --log simulation.log --residual-growth 10.0 --dt-drop 100.0 --json
Output includes alerts, residual_stats, and dt_stats fields
Emits alerts for NaN/Inf/overflow detection, residual growth, and adaptive dt collapse (the three checks runtime_monitor performs)
Reports whether the simulation appears healthy (empty alerts) or shows warning signs

script_checks.description: runtime monitor flags residual growth and dt collapse with exact min/max/last stats

evals.prompt: My simulation finished. Results are in results.json. The order parameter phi should stay between 0 and 1, and mass conservation should hold to within 1e-3. Validate the results.
evals.expected_output: Agent runs result_validator.py to check physical bounds and mass conservation on the finished simulation results.
assertions: Invokes scripts/result_validator.py with --metrics results.json --bound-min 0.0 --bound-max 1.0 --mass-tol 1e-3 --json
Output includes checks, confidence_score, and failed_checks fields
Validates that phi values remain within [0, 1] bounds
Checks mass conservation against the 1e-3 tolerance

script_checks.description: result validator passes bounds, mass, energy, and NaN checks for in-spec results

evals.prompt: my simulation crashed after 1000 steps. The log is at output/crash.log. What went wrong?
evals.expected_output: Agent runs failure_diagnoser.py to analyze the crash log, identifying probable causes and recommending fixes.
assertions: Invokes scripts/failure_diagnoser.py with --log output/crash.log --json
Output includes probable_causes and recommended_fixes fields
Identifies likely failure pattern (NaN/Inf, convergence failure, memory, dt collapse)
Provides specific actionable fixes (e.g., reduce dt, tune preconditioner, check initial conditions)

script_checks.description: failure diagnoser identifies numerical blow-up from a NaN/overflow crash log

assert.value: Reduce dt, tighten tolerances, or increase damping.

evals.prompt: Run a full validation pipeline: preflight check on config.json (require dt, dx, kappa, M with dt range 1e-6 to 1e-2), then diagnose the crash log at run.log to figure out why it blew up.
evals.expected_output: Agent runs both preflight_checker.py and failure_diagnoser.py, combining pre-launch validation (report.status with any blockers) with post-crash diagnosis (probable_causes / recommended_fixes), and notes any consistency between the two without claiming the config caused the failure.
assertions: Invokes scripts/preflight_checker.py with --config config.json --required dt,dx,kappa,M --ranges 'dt:1e-6:1e-2' --json
Invokes scripts/failure_diagnoser.py with --log run.log --json
Surfaces preflight report.status (PASS/WARN/BLOCK) and any blockers, e.g. a dt-out-of-range blocker when dt falls outside 1e-6 to 1e-2
Surfaces failure_diagnoser probable_causes and recommended_fixes from the crash log (e.g. a numerical blow-up cause and a reduce-dt fix)

script_checks.description: preflight on config.json BLOCKS on missing M and dt out of range
failure diagnoser identifies blow-up and convergence failure from the crash log

assert.value: Reduce dt, tighten tolerances, or increase damping.
Check solver/preconditioner settings and matrix conditioning.
